bonuses.stat:
Dealing damage with a Light Attack applies Eagle's Mark to your target for 12 seconds. Eagle's Mark causes an eagle to attack your target every 3 seconds after a 3 second delay, dealing 856 Physical damage per attack. 

Applying Eagle's Mark grants you Aerie's Call for 12 seconds, increasing your damage done with Animal Companion abilities by 10% against enemies with Eagle's Mark.

This effect can occur every 3 seconds but cannot be applied to enemies who have Eagle's Mark. You can have one Eagle's Mark active at a time.
